economic_notes: Owns 22% of River West Forest Products Ltd. (sawmill, inactive as at March 31, 2024). 17% limited partner in Dandzen Development Limited Partnership (1.25 MWdc solar PV plant). Subsequent to year-end, acquired remaining 35% of Elhdaqox Developments Ltd. for $300,000 (completed September 18, 2024). Multiple limited partnerships in forestry, greenworks, B&B, and leading edge sectors.
notes: Net debt position of $460,471. Six fully consolidated subsidiaries including 1380646 BC Ltd., Yunesit'in Development Enterprises, Yunesit'in Forest to Frame GP Inc., Yunesit'in Forest to Frame Limited Partnership (99.99%), Yunesit'in Leading Edge GP Inc., and Yunesit'in Leading Edge Limited Partnership (99.99%). Seven entities accounted for under modified equity method. Tsilhqot'in National Government is a significant revenue source at $2,680,774. Adopted PS 3400 Revenue standard effective April 1, 2023 on a prospective basis. Capital leases of $308,064 new in 2024. total_government_transfers estimated as ISC + FNHA + BC Gaming + FNESC + CCATEC + Province of BC + New Relationship Trust. annual_debt_service = demand loan repayment $105,788 + capital lease repayment $65,226.
